..label: spruce duff · the forest here is older · the birds are quieter

T.label: old-growth Sitka spruce · ninety feet up · a ceiling of green

L.label: a fallen log · thick with moss · once a fire ring must have sat behind it

R.label: a mossy boulder · lichen in three colors

H.label: a hollow in a lightning-struck spruce · dry inside · something has been kept in there

P.label: an iron tent peg · rusted · driven deep · four of them in a rectangle

D.label: a rectangle of freshly-turned earth · someone was here recently · dig it

c.label: a small cairn of black beach-stones · nine stones · deliberate

p.label: the deer trail back to the east forest

notes: The deep clearing · reachable via a hollow-log crawl from east_forest (Nika's SNEAK required to find the crawl-tile).  A rectangle of four iron tent pegs marks where a small counselor's tent once stood.  A patch of disturbed earth at the center of that rectangle · someone recently reburied a tin box, and did a poor job hiding the fact.  A hollow in a lightning-struck spruce holds a mildewed cassette in a plastic bag.  A small cairn of nine beach-stones sits under an old fire ring, one stone for each summer between 1976 and 1985 that this cabin was allowed to stay standing.  This is the private place a specific person came back to.
